name: Apple Almond Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Each, buttermilk and apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the whole-wheat flour, unbleached flour, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg yolks with oil, buttermilk, and apple juice until well combined.
3. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry mixture with the chopped almonds until all ingredients are moistened. Do not over stir.
4. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
6. Heat a griddle or non-stick pan to medium-high heat and grease lightly.
7. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot griddle for each pancake.
8. Cook until bubbles appear on the surface, then flip once.
9. Cook the other side until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
10. Serve warm. Makes 8 to 10 pancakes.
